description: A student registered with Disability Services needs to schedule an exam with their approved accommodation of 50% extra time.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and verify their approved accommodations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the student is registered with Disability Services and has an accommodation for 'extended time - 50%'.

nodes.task_description: Collect the exam details (course, professor, standard date/time).

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all necessary information about the specific exam.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the exam in the Disability Services testing center with the appropriate time adjustment and notify the professor.

expected_outcome.value: Agent books the testing room and sends automated notifications to the student and faculty.
